purpose: Define reusable native editable PPT production modules that convert aesthetic memory v2 into generated slide code.

modules.layout_recipe: Create one large focal canvas field, place the headline on an asymmetric edge, and keep all proof/report panels off the cover.
modules.typography_recipe: Use one headline with large hierarchy and two or fewer secondary labels.
modules.spacing_recipe: Use wide outer margin, broad whitespace around the focal field, and no filler marks in the margin.
modules.fallback_policy: If the focal object cannot be represented with native editable PPT primitives, use a simpler native shape field and keep release public_blocked.
modules.provenance_boundary: Use derived observations only; do not copy screenshots, brand marks, source layouts, source prose, video frames, audio, or transcripts.
modules.qa_probe: The contact sheet cover reads as a product opening before small text is readable.

modules.layout_recipe: Use an asymmetric canvas with a smaller before state and a larger after state connected by one delta marker.
modules.typography_recipe: Use headline hierarchy for state labels and one short implication line.
modules.spacing_recipe: Use margin and whitespace to separate state fields; do not give before and after equal grid weight.
modules.fallback_policy: If after-state scale cannot be preserved natively, reduce label count before falling back to an equal layout; keep public_blocked.
modules.provenance_boundary: Use derived observations only; do not copy screenshots, brand marks, source layouts, source prose, video frames, audio, or transcripts.
modules.qa_probe: The contact sheet shows an obvious before/after delta and enlarged after-state object.

modules.layout_recipe: Use the canvas as a route from data to memory to generated slide, with generated slide target as the focal object.
modules.typography_recipe: Use one headline and compact route labels; avoid paragraphs inside nodes.
modules.spacing_recipe: Use whitespace between route zones and a generous margin around the generated slide target.
modules.fallback_policy: If route labels overflow, move detail to trace before adding cards; keep all route objects native and public_blocked.
modules.provenance_boundary: Use derived observations only; do not copy screenshots, brand marks, source layouts, source prose, video frames, audio, or transcripts.
modules.qa_probe: The contact sheet shows a proof route whose focal object is a generated slide target, not equal process boxes.

modules.layout_recipe: Reserve the canvas center for a mini slide preview and place controls as secondary support objects.
modules.typography_recipe: Use a readable headline above or beside the preview and short control labels only.
modules.spacing_recipe: Use margin around the preview and whitespace between controls so the preview remains the visual object.
modules.fallback_policy: If the native mini preview becomes unreadable, simplify controls first; do not paste a screenshot; keep public_blocked.
modules.provenance_boundary: Use derived observations only; do not copy screenshots, brand marks, source layouts, source prose, video frames, audio, or transcripts.
modules.qa_probe: The contact sheet reads as a native product/system mini-preview, not a text-only workflow.

modules.layout_recipe: Break the previous canvas rhythm and give the hero object the largest visual field in the deck.
modules.typography_recipe: Use one short headline/verdict and sparse labels around the hero object.
modules.spacing_recipe: Use whitespace and wide margin so object scale reads as deliberate.
modules.fallback_policy: If the hero object cannot remain native, simplify it into editable grouped shapes; do not flatten the slide; keep public_blocked.
modules.provenance_boundary: Use derived observations only; do not copy screenshots, brand marks, source layouts, source prose, video frames, audio, or transcripts.
modules.qa_probe: The contact sheet shows a distinct visual climax that is larger than the proof route.

modules.layout_recipe: Use a calm canvas with one release gate, one next-action handoff, and one small editable mark.
modules.typography_recipe: Use a clear headline hierarchy for status and a smaller support line for next action.
modules.spacing_recipe: Use wide margin and whitespace; do not create an appendix-like status grid.
modules.fallback_policy: If the native gate cannot stay visually calm, remove secondary labels before adding panels; keep public_blocked until human approval.
modules.provenance_boundary: Use derived observations only; do not copy screenshots, brand marks, source layouts, source prose, video frames, audio, or transcripts.
modules.qa_probe: The contact sheet closes on a decision handoff rather than another report page.

qa_gates: module ids must be selected before slide code generation
module output must use native editable PPT primitives
fallback policy must remain public_blocked until render and human approval
contact sheet must show the module as a visible composition change
trace manifest must record visual_production_module_ids and aesthetic_memory_v2_ids
